python3 -c "
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import glob

base = '/home/mrsar/protein-ag/past-published-data/disease-relevant non-inhibited/'
files = glob.glob(base + '**/fit.tsv', recursive=True)

# Look at first 3 datasets
for f in files[:3]:
    df = pd.read_csv(f, sep='\t')
    print('File:', f.replace(base,''))
    print('Shape:', df.shape)
    print('Cols:', list(df.columns[:8]))
    print('x0 range:', df.iloc[:,0].min(), '-', df.iloc[:,0].max())
    print()
"
